title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
